name: psi-geo-r2-demo
description: Cloudflare Worker + R2 GeoPSINDEX feature API demo

scripts.seed:geo: cargo run --release --manifest-path ../geo-seed/Cargo.toml -- 100000 synthetic-points.parquet && cargo run --release --manifest-path ../../geo/Cargo.toml --bin gp2psindex -- build synthetic-points.parquet synthetic-points.psindex --payload feature-json --properties all
scripts.upload: wrangler r2 object put psi-geo-demo/synthetic-points.psindex --file synthetic-points.psindex --remote
